_doc: CANONICAL program state — the SINGLE source for the auto-generated status blocks. Edit THIS, then run `python3 tools/render_state.py --write` to refresh every <!-- BEGIN GENERATED:* --> block across the context docs (README, SESSION_BOOTSTRAP, SESSION_CHECKPOINT, EXPERIMENT_RUNBOOK §0.3, PROGRESS ⑤). Never hand-edit between the GENERATED markers. This is the 'generate-what's-mechanical' half of the anti-drift design (the other half = narrative fingerprints in tools/closeout_fingerprints.json). The pre-commit hook blocks commits where these blocks are stale vs this file.
north_star: F1 — prove/falsify the 'LLM-as-Database' spec is implementable BEFORE it is built; deliver a ready / not-ready-with-conditions determination. Falsification-first.
current_latest: D-D20-1 (compaction sub-batch granularity — B3N condition 3, component 2; CORPUS/23): the engine does a SINGLE joint solve regardless of N → the spec's 'sub-batch at 2,000' is a PRESCRIPTION, not engine behavior, and sub-batching = sequential accumulation = the corruption mechanism. WEAK-FORM FALSIFICATION (not a promoted node): partitioning a clean N=100 joint solve into accumulating sub-batches reintroduces held-out cross-entity corruption, ROBUST by C=10 (10 sub-batches: −19 to −34pp across 3 edit orderings; expr 96-100% excludes under-editing; anchor gates C=100→A1-clean & C=1→A0-corrupt PASS all 3). C=25 (4 sub-batches) is ORDER-SOFT (−3 to −19pp; within noise at one ordering) → NOT promotable; robust floor = C=10. BOUND: can falsify but NOT confirm condition 3 (N held at known-clean 100 → isolates chunking, not scale). SCALE component (single-solve cleanliness at true drift size; the spec's 2,000-SIZE boundary is 200× C=10) remains OPEN — gated on a larger stimulus pool (operator effort call). → B3N condition 3 now EVIDENCED-FAILING in its chunking component (was UNTESTED): the spec's sub-batched compaction cannot be assumed to return to clean. Dual-reviewed (advisor ×2 + gpt-5.5 at promote gate). docs/D20_COMPACTION_SUBBATCH_PREREG.md.
next_actions: READ/QUERY CONTRACT (CP2) — the biggest empty e2e cell (PROGRESS ⓪): L1 triple-readback + 5 query families + violates-rejection + reverse/aggregation/negation. Highest-leverage toward F1 (per the e2e coverage map, ahead of more write-engine scaling)

D20 component-1 (SCALE): single-solve cleanliness as total-N→thousands + where the spec's 2,000-size boundary sits vs the corruption floor — GATED on building a larger screened single-token stimulus pool (operator effort call)
7B numeric-threshold transfer via determinism (OQ-W1, B3N condition 1)

→ F1 reconciliation, written against the e2e map (SPEC_E2E_GROUND_TRUTH): proven cells + amended §8.7 + B3N 3-condition hybrid (condition 3 chunking-evidenced-failing) + the UNTOUCHED cells (read contract, Pruning/GC, governance-stress)
Optional: fresh-context re-grounding session (e2e-map-driven, read-contract-first) with NotebookLM/Perplexity/InfraNodus prompts — operator-run
f1_verdict: NOT delivered. Deployment data-path spine PROVEN-FOR-SCOPE (recipe→A1 batch-clean→B3 Q4_K_M→E1·A CPU-serve; 3B / N≤100). B3 architecture decision TAKEN + SPEC-GROUNDED (D-B3N-1): the spec's write model (§8.3/§8.7/§8.10) is a COMPACTION-BOUNDED HYBRID; in-weight viable for it under 3 conditions — (1) concentration-aware §8.7 (our k≤1 amendment); (2) compaction cadence; (3) ⚠ compaction-at-scale cleanliness (N≥2,000 sub-batched) = UNTESTED, the sharpest open falsifier. Side-store only for high-churn-online or if (3) fails. Remaining blocks: compaction-at-scale test (condition 3) + CP2 (contract) + 7B numeric transfer (OQ-W1, condition 1) + the §1.1 open dims.
